title: Requesting a New Laptop or Peripheral Hardware
text:
Q: How do I request a new laptop or peripheral hardware?
A: To request a new laptop or peripheral hardware, please follow these steps: Step 1: Log in to the company intranet using your employee credentials. Step 2: Navigate to the 'IT Support' section found in the main menu. Step 3: Click on 'Hardware Requests' to access the request form. Step 4: Fill out the form with your details, including your name, department, and the specific hardware you need (e.g., laptop, mouse, keyboard). Step 5: Provide a justification for your request in the designated field, explaining why the new hardware is necessary for your work. Step 6: Review your request for accuracy and click 'Submit.' Step 7: You will receive a confirmation email with a ticket number; please keep this for your records. Step 8: The IT department will review your request and contact you within 3-5 business days regarding approval or further information.
